meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Discover an advanced workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality SaaS apps faster and more reliably.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck isn't your coding ability; it's your lack of a rigid, automated shipping pipeline. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you decouple logic from boilerplate, enabling you to finish client projects with 3x the speed and professional-grade stability.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in a void of half-finished repositories. You’ve got the technical chops to build the features, but the 'last 10%'—the deployment, the edge case handling, the client-specific configurations—feels like wading through quicksand. Your client is waiting, your motivation is waning, and the project is stalling.

This isn't a failure of skill; it's a failure of system. To scale as a freelancer, you must move from 'developer' to 'architect.' By treating your client workflow as a repeatable engineering product, you can automate the friction out of the development cycle and hit production deadlines with surgical precision.

steps.title: Standardize the Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop reinventing the directory structure. Use Antigravity to enforce a production-ready boilerplate that ensures every project starts with identical, high-performance foundations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 14, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include authentication, structured error logging, and a clean folder architecture for scalable features.

steps.title: Decompose Feature Requests
steps.description: Break massive client requirements into atomic, verifiable tasks. This prevents feature creep and allows for rapid, iterative progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following project brief and decompose it into a granular JSON roadmap of atomic tasks, identifying dependencies and potential edge cases for each.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate repetitive CRUD operations and API routes, freeing your cognitive load for complex business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the API route handler and corresponding database schema for a subscription management module with Stripe webhooks.

steps.title: Enforce Testing Protocols
steps.description: Never ship without automated safety nets. Ensure every module has unit tests before the client even sees a demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Jest unit tests for the authentication controller, covering happy path, invalid inputs, and security edge cases.

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Integration
steps.description: Automate the path to production. Configure your CI/CD pipeline so that every commit is validated and staged automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel on push to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'decision log' markdown file in the root to stop clients from asking 'why did we do this?' three months later.
Use Claude Code to perform 'self-code-reviews' before pushing; prompt it to find potential security vulnerabilities.
Never start a task without a clearly defined 'Definition of Done' in your Antigravity prompt.
Keep your dependencies minimal; use Antigravity to prune unused packages every fortnight to keep build times low.
Automate your client demo links using a preview deployment script to maintain a constant feedback loop.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder. If it lacks a standardized structure, use the Antigravity scaffolding template today to reorganize your workflow.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop stalling and start shipping. Stop letting projects sit in the 'almost done' graveyard. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
